name: Lime Delicious Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crumbs, sugar and margarine; press onto the bottom of a 9-inch spring-form pan. Bake at 325°F for 10 minutes. Cool.
2. Soften the gelatin in water, stirring until dissolved. Add lime juice, egg yolks, 1/4 cup (50g) sugar and grated lime peel to the mixture; cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, for 5 minutes.
3. Allow the mixture to cool. Gradually add the softened gelatin mixture to the Light Neufchatel cheese, mixing at a medium speed on an electric mixer until well blended. Stir in a few drops of green food coloring if desired.
4. Beat egg whites with salt until foamy. Gradually add the remaining sugar, beating until stiff peaks form.
5. Gently fold the beaten egg white mixture and whipped topping into the cheese mixture. Pour over the crust.
6. Chill until firm. Garnish with additional lime peel if desired.
